calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Petitioner: Xiao Xia Cai, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: SHi Ying Qiu and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner: Weirong Qiu, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to change name of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Cindy Shiying Qiu.
Decree signed in open court.
